Subject: A tiny baby
Theme: A baby frightened by eerie Halloween decorations
Event: The tiny baby cried in fear as it saw a doll wearing a clown mask splattered with fake blood sitting eerily nearby.
story_prompts: The same A tiny baby trembling, wide-eyed, crawling cautiously near a dimly lit porch with an old, cracked doll sitting motionless in the shadows.
The same A tiny baby backed away, crying, as a sinister clown mask emerges hanging from a nearby tree branch under flickering streetlight.
The same A tiny baby reaching out hesitantly, tears streaming, while faint splatters of fake blood appear smeared on the cracked porch floor.
The same A tiny baby curled up on a dark doorstep, crying in fear, surrounded by eerie Halloween decorations including the blood-smeared clown mask and doll.
